scripts.test: pnpm build:sdk && pnpm build:test-support && pnpm -r --if-present test
scripts.test:coverage: pnpm build:sdk && pnpm build:test-support && pnpm --filter @portaki/sdk test:coverage && pnpm --filter @portaki/cli test:coverage && pnpm --filter @portaki/sdk-test-support test:coverage
scripts.docs:build: pnpm docs:sync && pnpm docs:api && pnpm --filter @portaki/docs-site build
